CheckTitle: Ensure no agent identity holds a blocked permission
Description: Validates that no agent identity has been granted a permission from Microsoft's globally blocked list. These permissions should be unassignable to agents at the platform level, so any grant indicates a bypass or legacy condition.
Risk: Blocked permissions exist because they are too dangerous for autonomous agents — including Directory.ReadWrite.All, RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Directory, and Application.ReadWrite.All. An agent holding these can escalate privileges or modify tenant-critical configuration.

Remediation.Recommendation: Remove the blocked permission grant immediately. Investigate how the permission was assigned — it may indicate a platform bug or policy circumvention.

SourceNotes: Blocked permission list sourced from Microsoft Entra Agent ID documentation.
